description_long: This is a tall, elegant vase with a dark, vertically ribbed body and a golden rim at the top and base. The vase features attached white roses and green leaves, which are sculpted and positioned to one side, giving it a decorative and ornate appearance. The base is hexagonal and slightly flared, providing stability and a touch of geometric contrast to the otherwise organic floral embellishments. The surface of the vase appears hard and slightly matte, with subtle textural variations that mimic ceramic or painted metal. The floral decorations are prominent and detailed, standing out against the dark body of the vase. This object would serve as a striking decorative piece in an urban park, plaza, or upscale public space.
description: A tall, dark vase with a golden rim and base, adorned with sculpted white roses and green leaves on one side. The vase has a ribbed texture and a hexagonal base, making it a visually striking decorative object.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from an angle highlighting the golden rim and base, with white roses and green leaves visible on the right side.
description_view_1: This view shows the front of the vase, with the largest white rose and most of the floral decoration fully visible.
description_view_2: The main white rose and accompanying leaves are prominent, with the floral arrangement facing directly forward.
description_view_3: The back of the vase is visible, showing mostly the ribbed dark surface with only a small portion of the floral decoration peeking out.
